title: timegate
summary: Link relation type "timegate": The Target IRI points to a TimeGate for an Original Resource. Defined in RFC7089.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

raw_columns.Description: The Target IRI points to a TimeGate for an Original Resource.
raw_columns.Notes:
A TimeGate for an Original Resource is a resource that is
      capable of datetime negotiation to support access to prior states
      of the Original Resource.
